Open and Decentralized Protocol For Syncing Various Wallets to Dapps Secure Server.

DeFi projects that you might find interesting

01

Safe & Secure

It's safe in the sense that it establishes a secure (encrypted) connection, with your approval, between your Bitcoin.com Wallet and the DApps of your choosing.

02

Available globally

It is becoming increasingly popular as a way for users to interact with decentralized applications easily and conveniently.

03

About Us

WalletConnect is the web3 communications protocol allowing interoperability between wallets and dapps across chains. We began with a single API and now facilitate millions of messages and connections each month.

04

24/7 Support

Our Live Supports are always availabe to help you 24/7.
